description_long: This object is a vintage-style corded telephone with a polished wooden base and body, featuring a prominent rotary dial on the front. The dial is metallic with white numbers and a black finger stop, positioned below a large, black, horn-shaped mouthpiece. A black cylindrical handset is attached to the left side of the phone by a visible gray cord, and it hangs from a metallic hook. The base is broad and rectangular, providing stability and a classic aesthetic. The wood grain is rich and reddish-brown, giving the phone an elegant, antique appearance. The overall design suggests a sturdy, functional device typical of early 20th-century telecommunication equipment.
description: A vintage corded telephone with a polished wooden body, rotary dial, and black handset attached by a cord. The design features a prominent mouthpiece and classic metallic accents.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the smooth, polished wooden back and the handset hanging on the left side, with the cord trailing down.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the protruding mouthpiece, rotary dial, and the full length of the handset and cord.
description_view_2: The front view displays the rotary dial, large mouthpiece, and the overall symmetrical design of the phone.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the wooden side panel and the profile of the mouthpiece and dial, with no handset visible.
